title: L1 buildUserPayload appends TOOL_INDEX_INSTRUCTION when journal has tool calls
scenario: Compaction pipeline at narrative-kind path. JournalUnpinned contains one assistant message with a ToolPart (read). buildUserPayload should return a prompt string containing the explicit '## TOOL_INDEX' instruction block.

title: L1 buildUserPayload includes instruction even when journal has no tool calls
scenario: Idempotent instruction emission — LLM emits empty TOOL_INDEX table; ensures format consistency.

title: L1 validateToolIndex parses a well-formed index section
scenario: Anchor body has narrative prose followed by a markdown table; validator returns found=true with correct entryCount.

input.body:
narrative text

## TOOL_INDEX

| tool_call_id | tool_name | args_brief | status | output_chars |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| call_abc | read | /foo | ok | 1234 |
| call_def | grep | pattern | ok | 89 |

title: L1 validateToolIndex detects missing section
scenario: LLM ignored TOOL_INDEX instruction; validator must report missing and emit telemetry.

title: L1 validateToolIndex tolerates whitespace variance
scenario: LLM emits the section but with non-standard whitespace; validator must still parse it.

input.body:
narrative

##  TOOL_INDEX  
| tool_call_id | tool_name | args_brief | status | output_chars |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| call_abc | read | /foo | ok | 1234 |

title: L2 RecallTool returns content for known callID
scenario: Session stream contains a ToolPart with callID call_abc and output 'hello world'. Recall returns content with correct metadata.

title: L2 RecallTool returns unknown_call_id for missing callID
scenario: Empty session or callID not present in stream; recall returns typed error with re-execution advice.

title: L2 RecallTool marks redundant=true for post-anchor live callID
scenario: callID is still in post-anchor journal; recall succeeds but flags the redundancy in metadata for telemetry.

title: L2 RecallTool rejects empty string callID via zod
scenario: Input validation fails before reaching helper.

title: L2 recallByCallId helper scans across message boundaries
scenario: Stream has user/assistant messages interleaved; helper walks all messages to find ToolPart by callID.

title: L2 recallByCallId returns first match when duplicates exist
scenario: Stream has two ToolPart entries with same callID (rare but possible due to retry); helper returns the first chronologically.

title: L3 amnesia notice injected when most-recent anchor is narrative
scenario: Session has a narrative-kind anchor as the most recent summary message. Next-turn prompt assembly must include system_block_amnesia_notice.

title: L3 amnesia notice NOT injected when most-recent anchor is hybrid_llm
scenario: Session has a hybrid_llm-kind anchor; server-side path preserves chain; no notice needed.

title: L3 amnesia notice NOT injected when no anchor exists
scenario: Fresh session; no anchor at all.

title: L3 amnesia notice NOT injected when narrative is superseded by hybrid_llm
scenario: Two anchors exist: an older narrative and a newer hybrid_llm. Most-recent is the hybrid one; no notice injected.

title: Integration: narrative compaction → next-turn notice → recall returns content
scenario: End-to-end happy path. Spin up a test session, execute 3 dummy tool calls, force narrative compaction, verify TOOL_INDEX, trigger next prompt, verify notice, invoke recall.
